raw_result.description: Devin is Cognition’s AI software engineering platform with a public REST API for managing sessions, knowledge, and usage data.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official docs describe Bearer authentication using two token types: Service User API Keys for automation and Personal Access Tokens for human programmatic access; both are token strings with a 'cog_' prefix.
raw_result.gating_reason: The public API is scoped to organization and enterprise base URLs in the official docs, suggesting access is tied to an existing Devin org/enterprise account rather than a clearly free self-serve developer tier.

api_surface.breadth: Official docs show a v3 REST API with organization and enterprise base URLs plus resources for sessions, knowledge, and consumption/usage data; breadth appears meaningful but not fully verified from the gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official MCP support or official MCP server evidence was found in the gathered official-docs evidence.

raw_result.blocker: A first toolkit appears buildable from public REST docs, but practical access likely requires an existing paid Devin organization/enterprise account and MCP support was not verified.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: No published rate-limit details were verified in the gathered evidence.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs expose base URLs under https://api.devin.ai/v3/organizations/* and /v3/enterprise/* and document service-user vs personal token auth, which is a strong signal of a real public API surface.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Pricing/access tier and MCP existence were not conclusively verified from a dedicated official pricing/access or MCP page in the gathered evidence; rate limits were also not found, so those fields remain somewhat uncertain.

result.description: Devin is Cognition’s AI software engineering platform with a public REST API for managing sessions, knowledge, and usage data.
result.auth_notes: Official docs describe Bearer authentication using two token types: Service User API Keys for automation and Personal Access Tokens for human programmatic access; both are token strings with a 'cog_' prefix.

api_surface.mcp_notes: No official MCP support or official MCP server evidence was found in the gathered official-docs evidence.
